name: Time Travel Credit Repair Inc
description_short: Time Travel Credit Repair offers dispute and removal services for negative items on credit reports through three rounds of disputes with major credit bureaus.
description_long:
Time Travel Credit Repair is a credit restoration company based in Ypsilanti, Michigan, that focuses on disputing inaccurate, outdated, or settled items appearing on consumer credit reports. The company positions itself as a comprehensive credit repair solution for individuals, families, and businesses seeking to improve their creditworthiness for major financial goals.

The company's core service involves a three-step process: initial consultation and credit education, identification and dispute of inaccuracies on credit reports, and ongoing credit building guidance. They conduct three rounds of disputes with the three major credit bureaus (Experian, Equifax, and TransUnion) and claim clients should expect to see 50-75% removal of eligible negative items within six months, with score improvements visible in 30-45 days. Their service menu includes removal assistance for collections, late payments, tax liens, judgments, medical bills, repossessions, and charge-offs.

Time Travel positions itself through a "5 Star Credit Restoration Company" branding and emphasizes education as part of their service model. They offer free consultations, maintain a client portal, provide an affiliate program, and have launched a credit repair sales funnel with downloadable educational resources. The company's stated mission is "Changing lives by perfecting individuals financial wellbeing while giving the knowledge and power to become financially free."

While the company presents standard credit repair dispute services, consumers should note that all credit repair companies face inherent limitations—they cannot remove accurate negative information, only dispute inaccuracies. The promised removal rates of 50-75% and timeline improvements are common industry claims but not guaranteed. The company's copyright shows "2026," suggesting either a website error or recent establishment. No third-party ratings, BBB accreditation status, or client testimonials are provided on the accessible website content.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Offers three rounds of disputes with all three major credit bureaus (Experian, Equifax, TransUnion)
Provides free initial credit consultation with no obligation
Educational approach includes credit score factor breakdown and building strategies beyond debt payoff
Accessible pricing tiers with online scheduling system
Maintains client portal for account management and progress tracking
Affiliate program available for partner referrals
Located at verifiable physical address in Ypsilanti, Michigan with published phone number
cons: Claims 50-75% removal rates and 30-45 day improvements that are typical industry promises but not guaranteed outcomes
No independent verification, BBB accreditation status, or third-party ratings visible on website
Cannot remove accurate negative information—only disputes inaccuracies, a fundamental limitation not prominently disclosed
Website contains minor errors (copyright year listed as 2026) suggesting possible maintenance issues
No client testimonials or case studies provided to validate service effectiveness
best_for: Consumers with inaccurate, outdated, or incorrectly reported items on their credit reports seeking organized dispute assistance
Individuals preparing to apply for mortgages, auto loans, or business financing who need score improvements
People who want educational guidance on credit factors and credit building strategies alongside dispute services
diagnosis: Time Travel Credit Repair is best for consumers who have confirmed inaccurate or outdated negative items on their credit reports and want professional assistance disputing them with the three major bureaus. The primary caveat is that credit repair companies can only dispute and remove inaccurate information—they cannot remove accurate negative items—and promised removal rates should be viewed as estimates rather than guarantees.
services: Three-round credit report disputes with Experian, Equifax, and TransUnion
Identification and dispute of inaccurate items
Identification and dispute of outdated items
Credit building and score improvement guidance
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
